# QuickQR — Lightning-Fast QR Codes

https://www.quickqr.app

## Overview
QuickQR generates scannable QR codes instantly in the browser. No signup required for static QR codes. Upgrade to Pro for dynamic QR codes with analytics.

## Features
- **Static QR Codes** (Free) — Generate QR codes without an account. Works offline. Perfect for print materials, packaging, and permanent links.
- **Dynamic QR Codes** (Pro) — Edit destination URLs anytime, full scan analytics, A/B testing ready, location & device data.

## How It Works
1. Go to https://www.quickqr.app
2. Choose a type: URL, Text, Email, or Phone
3. Enter your content — QR code generates live
4. Customize dot color and background color
5. Download as PNG

## Pricing
- **Free tier**: Unlimited static QR codes, no account needed
- **Pro**: Pay-as-you-go — edit URLs after creation, full analytics

## Pages
- https://www.quickqr.app — Main QR generator
- https://www.quickqr.app/auth/signin — Sign in
- https://www.quickqr.app/auth/signup — Create account
